hero.headline: Experience the Art of Beauty
hero.subheadline: New York's premier luxury salon, where every visit is a masterpiece.

intro.heading: A Sanctuary of Style
intro.text: At Aurélia, we believe that beauty is an art form. Our award-winning team of stylists combines timeless technique with contemporary innovation, creating looks that are as unique as you are. Step into our world of luxury, where every detail is crafted to perfection.

featured_services.title: Signature Cuts
featured_services.description: Precision cuts tailored to your face shape and lifestyle.

featured_services.title: Color Artistry
featured_services.description: From subtle balayage to bold transformations.

featured_services.title: Bridal Luxury
featured_services.description: Your dream look for your most memorable day.

features.title: Master Stylists
features.description: Our team trains at the world's top academies in Paris, Milan, and Tokyo.

features.title: Premium Products
features.description: We exclusively use Oribe, Kérastase, and other luxury brands.

features.title: Personalized Experience
features.description: Every service begins with an in-depth consultation.

features.title: Sustainable Beauty
features.description: Eco-conscious products and practices for a better tomorrow.

features.title: Luxurious Atmosphere
features.description: A serene, design-forward space designed for total relaxation.

features.title: Flexible Booking
features.description: Easy online booking with same-day availability.

testimonials.name: Sophia Laurent
testimonials.text: Aurélia transformed my look completely. The attention to detail is unmatched — I've never felt more confident.

testimonials.name: James Chen
testimonials.text: From the moment you walk in, you know you're in for something special. Truly world-class service.

testimonials.name: Amara Williams
testimonials.text: The team understands texture, face shape, and personal style like no one else in the city.

testimonials.name: Elena Marchetti
testimonials.text: My bridal hair and makeup were absolute perfection. Every photo from my wedding is a dream.

testimonials.name: David Park
testimonials.text: Finally found a salon that treats men's grooming with the same artistry. Outstanding work every time.

cta_banner.headline: Your Transformation Awaits
cta_banner.subheadline: Book your appointment today and discover the Aurélia difference.

services.page_subheading: Explore our curated menu of premium beauty services, each designed to reveal your most radiant self.

services.name: Signature Haircut
services.description: Precision cut with consultation, shampoo, and blow-dry styling.

services.description: Expert cut with hot towel treatment and styling.

services.description: Gentle, fun haircuts for kids 12 and under.

services.description: Luxurious blowout with your choice of style.

services.description: Elegant updo for galas, weddings, and events.

services.description: Expert correction to restore your desired shade.

services.description: Purifying treatment to rejuvenate the scalp and promote growth.

services.description: Customized facial with cleansing, exfoliation, mask, and massage.

services.description: Quick revitalizing treatment for instant radiance.

services.description: Advanced exfoliation to reveal smoother, younger-looking skin.

services.name: LED Light Therapy
services.description: Non-invasive treatment for acne, aging, and skin renewal.

services.name: Classic Manicure
services.description: Nail shaping, cuticle care, massage, and polish.

services.name: Gel Manicure
services.description: Long-lasting gel polish with chip-free shine.

services.name: Spa Pedicure
services.description: Soak, scrub, massage, and polish for beautiful feet.

services.name: Nail Art
services.description: Custom designs, French tips, and artistic accents.

services.name: Bridal Hair & Makeup Trial
services.description: Complete trial run to perfect your wedding day look.

services.name: Wedding Day Package
services.description: Hair styling, makeup, and touch-up kit for the bride.

services.name: Bridal Party Styling
services.description: Hair and makeup for bridesmaids (per person).

services.name: Pre-Wedding Glow Package
services.description: Facial, manicure, and conditioning treatment.

consultation_cta.heading: Not sure which service is right for you?
consultation_cta.text: Book a complimentary consultation with one of our stylists.

team.intro: Our world-class team of stylists, colorists, and beauty experts bring decades of combined experience and a shared passion for making you look and feel extraordinary.

members.name: Isabella Fontaine
members.bio: With 20 years of experience and training at Vidal Sassoon London, Isabella leads our creative vision. She specializes in transformative cuts and editorial styling.

members.name: Marcus Rivera
members.bio: Marcus is a color genius known for his seamless balayage and bold creative color. Trained in Paris, he brings European artistry to every appointment.

members.name: Aiko Tanaka
members.bio: Aiko brings 15 years of Tokyo-trained precision to New York. Her minimalist, architectural approach to cutting has earned her a devoted following.

members.name: Charlotte Duval
members.bio: Charlotte has styled over 500 brides and has been featured in Vogue Weddings and Martha Stewart. She creates timeless, romantic looks.

members.name: Devon Mitchell
members.bio: A licensed esthetician with advanced certifications in medical-grade facials, Devon transforms skin with science-backed treatments and personalized regimens.

members.name: Nina Volkov
members.bio: Originally from Moscow, Nina is an award-winning nail artist whose intricate designs have been featured in Elle and Harper's Bazaar.

booking.page_subheading: Select your service, stylist, and preferred time. We can't wait to see you.

confirmation.heading: Booking Confirmed!
confirmation.message: We look forward to seeing you. A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox.

story.heading: Our Story
story.subheading: A Legacy of Beauty, Born from Passion
story.text: Founded in 2010 by Isabella Fontaine, Aurélia began as a small studio in the heart of Manhattan with a bold vision: to redefine the salon experience. What started as a two-chair operation has blossomed into one of New York's most sought-after beauty destinations, celebrated for its artistry, innovation, and commitment to making every client feel extraordinary.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.text: To elevate the art of beauty through personalized, world-class service in a space that inspires confidence and self-expression.

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.description: Isabella Fontaine opens a two-chair studio on the Upper East Side with a dream of redefining beauty.

timeline.title: First Award
timeline.description: Aurélia wins 'Best New Salon' from New York Magazine, putting us on the map.

timeline.title: Expansion
timeline.description: We move to our flagship location on Madison Avenue, tripling our space and team.

timeline.title: Bridal Studio Launch
timeline.description: Launch of our dedicated bridal suite, becoming the go-to salon for NYC weddings.

timeline.title: Sustainability Pledge
timeline.description: Aurélia becomes the first salon in Manhattan to achieve Green Circle certification.

timeline.title: Digital Innovation
timeline.description: Launch of our online booking platform and virtual consultation services.

timeline.title: 15 Years of Excellence
timeline.description: Celebrating 15 years with over 25,000 happy clients and counting.

values.title: Artistry
values.description: We treat every service as a work of art, combining technique with creative vision.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We never stop learning, training, and pushing the boundaries of our craft.

values.title: Inclusivity
values.description: Beauty has no boundaries. We celebrate and serve every individual.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: We're committed to eco-friendly products, practices, and a greener future.

sustainability.heading: Our Commitment to Sustainability
sustainability.text: We believe beauty shouldn't come at the planet's expense. From our Green Circle Salon certification to our partnerships with sustainable brands, we're taking real steps toward a more responsible future. All of our products are cruelty-free, and we recycle over 95% of our salon waste.

contact.page_subheading: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out with questions, feedback, or to book your next visit.
contact.form_success_message: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
